welcome_desc: 把一切都寫下來。不要評斷。不要分類。只是放下。
step_1: 1. 將你的大腦下載到數位頁面。
step_2: 2. 將需要採取行動的事項和可以等待的事項進行分類。
step_3: 3. 專注於下一步的一個小步驟。
dump_hint: 你現在腦子裡想的任何事。
sort_desc: 拖放或點擊即可移動物品。
letgo_desc: 不重要，也不在我的控制範圍內。
small_step_desc: 每次行動，都只專注在最開始的一件小事。
reflection_desc: 現在你理清了思路，感覺如何？
reflection_placeholder: 請寫一篇簡短的反思文章…

common.completion_message: You've successfully completed this activity. Take a moment to appreciate your progress.
common.share_text: I have done this {{activityName}} in TherapyMantra and really enjoy it you can do it too just follow the link to android app {{androidUrl}} or ios app {{iosUrl}}
common.instruction_ready: Set your rounds and tap play to begin
common.instruction_running: Follow the circle to regulate your breath

intro_p1: 1. Download your brain onto the digital page.
intro_p2: 2. Sort into what needs action and what can wait.
intro_p3: 3. Focus on just one small next step.
pick_one_thing_to_focus_on: Pick ONE thing to focus on
e_g_open_the_document_tidy_one_corner: e.g., Open the document, tidy one corner...
your_mind_is_clear_and_ready_for_the_nex: Your mind is clear and ready for the next step.
instruction_ready: Set your rounds and tap play to begin
instruction_running: Follow the circle to regulate your breath
